meaning: n.结果,[逻]推理,推论,因果关系,重要的地位
examples: This is a necessary consequence of progress.
It was an inevitable consequence of the decision.
One consequence of global warming is extinction.
Galbraith opined that one consequence of the industrial state was the impoverishment of the public sector.
Other than minor legal wrangling, this matter should be of little consequence to Tesla.
